_comment: IRIS Phase 1 input schema. One object = one admission session. Phase 0 stubs populate 'patient' and 'hospital'. MEDCO fills 'clinical'.

patient._comment: Populated by verify_bis() stub. Do not edit manually in production.
patient.name: Ravi Kumar

past_claims._comment: From BIS claim history. Used for Special Conditions Rule check (E26) and diagnostic add-on cap tracking (E33).

hospital._comment: Populated by check_hospital_empanelment() stub. Do not edit manually in production.
hospital.name: Apollo Hospitals Chennai

clinical._comment: Filled by MEDCO in IRIS UI before raising pre-auth in TMS.
clinical.chief_complaints: Chest pain radiating to left arm, sweating, breathlessness since 4 hours
clinical._planned_procedure_note: null if unknown at admission. Free text if known e.g. 'Primary PTCA'. IRIS uses this as a hint in Phase 2 candidate generation.

vitals._comment: Used in Phase 1 for ER severity (stable vs unstable cardiopulmonary status → ER002A vs ER002B).

investigations._comment: Each entry = one investigation type. result_summary drives Phase 2 clinical entity extraction and Phase 3.5 stratification. document_available drives Phase 9 document gap analysis.
investigations.result_summary: ST elevation in leads II, III, aVF — inferior STEMI pattern
Troponin I 2.8 ng/mL elevated, CK-MB 48 U/L elevated

clinical._comorbidities_note: Free-text list of active conditions. Used in Phase 7 comorbidity resolution — engine checks if each comorbidity is absorbed in surgical package or needs separate package.

non_clinical_documents_in_hand._comment: Non-investigation documents MEDCO physically has right now. Drives Phase 9 gap analysis for universal and conditional doc requirements.
non_clinical_documents_in_hand.label: Admission / clinical notes
Photo of patient on hospital bed

clinical.notes: Patient brought by family. BP crashing on arrival. IV fluids started. Cardiology team called. Likely needs primary PTCA.
